steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$V_T=\frac{V_S}{1-C}$$
Multiply both sides by $1-C$:
$$V_T(1-C)=V_S$$

steps.title: Isolate the concentration
steps.content:
Distribute and solve for $C$:
$$V_T-V_TC=V_S$$
$$V_TC=V_T-V_S$$
$$C=\frac{V_T-V_S}{V_T}=1-\frac{V_S}{V_T}$$
The answer is A.
